title: 2023 Municipal Election Candidate Filing Period Opens July 14
summary: The 2023 City and Borough of Juneau Regular Municipal Election candidate filing period opens Friday, July 14 at 8 a.m. and closes Monday, July 24, at 4:30 p.m. This fall, Juneau voters will elect four Assembly members and two Board of Education (School Board) members. Juneau residents are encouraged to consider this opportunity to serve the public and contribute to their com...

title: Tribal College Small Business Achievement Grant Program Open
summary: Applications are now open for the SBA Tribal College Small Business Achievement grant program to fund up to four (4) Tribal Colleges and Universities (TCUs) to provide entrepreneurial development services to Native American communities. summary: There’s something magical that happens in Alaska in the summer.
